content_body: This was a beautiful cabin which felt like home. Enjoyed the river, fire and peaceful time. Mom spoiled the family and everyone relaxed and enjoyed the beautiful scenery and cabin. We did the Train Ride, Stone Mountain, Dahlonega, Helen, Merciers Orchards, hot tub, games ~ listened to the river and just enjoyed the simple things. Again this was a great cabin! It was very cozy and made our experience so much better! We Loved It!
title: Excellent Family Vacation at Rolling River Cabin
